# Grand Strand Ally

## Business

- Name: Grand Strand Ally
- Domain: https://gsally.com
- Industry: Information Technology Services
- Business type: Managed service provider for small and medium businesses

## Description

Grand Strand Ally helps small and medium businesses in the Myrtle Beach and Grand Strand area of South Carolina gain clearer visibility into their information technology costs, simplify vendor and tool structure, and strengthen compliance-minded support operations. The company offers month-to-month managed information technology support with no long-term contracts, starting with a free cost analysis of each client's current environment.

## Location and Service Area

- Primary city: Myrtle Beach, SC
- Region: Grand Strand, South Carolina
- Counties served: Horry County, Georgetown County
- Nearby communities: Conway, North Myrtle Beach, Surfside Beach, Murrells Inlet, Pawleys Island, Little River, Socastee

## Main Service Pages

- Homepage: https://gsally.com/
- Services overview: https://gsally.com/services
- Pricing and support models: https://gsally.com/pricing
- Contact and cost analysis scheduling: https://gsally.com/contact

## Services Offered

- Managed Information Technology Support — predictable monthly support with clear ownership and fewer vendors to manage
- Microsoft 365 Setup and Support — right-sized licensing, cleaner admin controls, and consistent user lifecycle management
- Network and Wi-Fi Management — reliable, documented networking for small and medium business environments
- Cybersecurity and Compliance Support — practical security controls, access management, and compliance-minded configurations
- Backup and Recovery — automated, tested backups supporting business continuity and documentation requirements
- Workflow Automation and User Onboarding and Offboarding — standardized user lifecycle workflows that reduce compliance risk

## Educational and Tool Pages

- Free Information Technology Cost Analysis tool: https://gsally.com/cost-analysis
  This free, no-login-required tool helps businesses estimate their current information technology spend, identify overlapping tools and vendor redundancy, and surface compliance considerations. Takes approximately five minutes to complete.

## Legal Pages

- Privacy Policy: https://gsally.com/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://gsally.com/terms

## Contact

- Email: shawn@gsally.com
- Phone: 973-202-1455
- Contact form: https://gsally.com/contact

## Key Positioning

- No long-term contracts required
- Month-to-month service agreements
- Scope defined before work begins
- Free cost analysis available to all prospective clients
- Focus on cost clarity, practical support, and compliance-minded systems
